title: DoodleMeme – Animated Memes from Your Hand Drawn Doodles (No GenAI)
abstract:
I like doodling, and I like character animation. I made a little tool that can animate your hand drawn characters and put them into an animated meme.

It's free, there's no login needed, and it uses an animation pipeline (not generative AI) to create the outputs. Works on desktop and mobi
